answer_description: A dark-colored car enters the intersection from the bottom-left lane and proceeds to cross into the opposite direction of traffic flow, violating the one-way lane marked by the road sign. The car exits the frame moving toward the middle-right of the intersection. The scene is captured during dawn with clear weather and visible lane markings.

A light-colored car enters the intersection from the right side and proceeds to drive across the center median, which is marked with '車行禁行' (No Vehicle Crossing) and a no-left-turn sign. The car then exits the frame to the left, indicating a wrong-way maneuver across the median. The scene is captured during dawn with clear weather and minimal traffic.
